messages.content: hey! sorry i kinda disappeared for a few days, life got busy lol

Hey, welcome back! No need to apologize at all - life gets busy, that's totally normal! 😊

How are you doing? Things settle down a bit, or still in the thick of it?
yeah i was out with some friends this weekend, met a few new people too, was a good time

That sounds really fun! There's something great about a weekend where you actually get out and meet new people - it can feel pretty energizing. 

Did you click with anyone in particular, or was it more just a good group vibe overall?
theres this one person i hit it off with, we've been texting nonstop honestly. kinda excited about it

Ooh that's exciting! That nonstop texting phase where everything feels fresh and you're just vibing with someone is such a good feeling. 😄

How'd you two meet - through mutual friends or just happened to cross paths at whatever you were doing?
anyway i'll probably be around less now that im seeing them more. just wanted to let you know whats up

That's really sweet of you to check in! It sounds like things are going really well and I hope it continues to - enjoy getting to know them! 😊

Don't worry about being around less, that's just life doing its thing. Hope it all goes great!
